name: Zackriya-Solutions
description:
Sponsor
    
  



      
            
    

    

        
          Star


  

  
    
    


      
        Zackriya-Solutions /

      meetily  

    
      Privacy first, AI meeting assistant with 4x faster Parakeet/Whisper live transcription, speaker diarization, and Ollama summarization built on Rust. 100% local processing. no cloud required. Meetily (Meetly Ai - https://meetily.ai) is the #1 Self-hosted, Open-source Ai meeting note taker for macOS & Windows.
summary: Meetily是一款基于Rust开发的隐私优先AI会议助手，具备4倍速实时转录、说话人分离和本地摘要功能，完全离线处理无需云端，是排名第一的自托管开源会议笔记工具。

name: agent-skills
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        addyosmani /

      Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents.
summary: 该项目为AI编程助手提供生产级的工程技能，帮助开发者构建更可靠、高效的AI辅助编程工具。

name: asgeirtj
description:
Sponsor
    
  



      
            
    

    

        
          Star


  

  
    
    


      
        asgeirtj /

      system_prompts_leaks  

    
      Extracted system prompts from Anthropic - Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Claude Code, Claude Design. OpenAI - ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking, GPT 5.5 Instant, Codex. Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash, 3.1 Pro, Antigravity. xAI - Grok, Cursor, Copilot, VS Code, Perplexity, and more. Updated regularly.
summary: 该项目收集并定期更新多个主流AI模型（如Claude、GPT、Gemini等）泄露的系统提示词，为研究AI行为机制提供重要参考。

name: CubeSandbox
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        TencentCloud /

      CubeSandbox  

    
      Instant, Concurrent, Secure & Lightweight Sandbox for AI Agents.
summary: 腾讯云CubeSandbox是用Rust开发的AI智能体沙箱，具备即时启动、并发安全、轻量级等特性，为AI应用提供安全隔离的运行环境。

name: OfficeCLI
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        iOfficeAI /

      OfficeCLI  

    
      OfficeCLI is the first and best Office suite purpose-built for AI agents to read, edit, and automate Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files. Free, open-source, single binary, no Office installation required.
summary: OfficeCLI是首个专为AI代理设计的Office工具套件，无需安装Office即可免费开源地自动化处理Word、Excel和PowerPoint文件。

name: claude-video
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        bradautomates /

      claude-video  

    
      Give Claude the ability to watch any video. /watch downloads, extracts frames, transcribes, hands it all to Claude.
summary: 该项目让Claude AI能够分析视频内容，通过下载视频、提取画面帧和转录音频，为视频理解提供了创新解决方案。

name: pocket-tts
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        kyutai-labs /

      pocket-tts  

    
      A TTS that fits in your CPU (and pocket)
summary: 这是一个能在CPU上高效运行的轻量级文本转语音模型，因其体积小巧且性能出色而值得关注。

A delectable showcase of top tier skills, ambidextrous agents, scintillating status lines, top notch developer tooling, and also we have plugins
